title: Sendspin BT Bridge Configuration
description: Machine-readable schema for /config/config.json used by the Sendspin BT Bridge.

CONFIG_SCHEMA_VERSION.description: Schema version; managed by the application — do not change.

SENDSPIN_SERVER.description: Music Assistant server hostname/IP. 'auto' uses mDNS discovery.

WEB_PORT.description: Web UI port. null = use WEB_PORT env var or 8080.

BASE_LISTEN_PORT.description: Override per-device Sendspin listener base port. null = auto-assign.

BRIDGE_NAME.description: Bridge instance name. Empty or 'auto' resolves to hostname.

BLUETOOTH_DEVICES.description: List of configured Bluetooth speaker devices.

HA_AREA_NAME_ASSIST_ENABLED.description: Enable automatic room name assist from Home Assistant areas.

HA_ADAPTER_AREA_MAP.description: Manual mapping of adapter MAC → HA area name.

LAST_VOLUMES.description: Runtime state: persisted per-device volumes keyed by MAC.

LAST_SINKS.description: Runtime state: persisted per-device PulseAudio sink names keyed by MAC.

PREFER_SBC_CODEC.description: Prefer SBC codec over AAC/aptX for Bluetooth audio.

BT_CHECK_INTERVAL.description: Bluetooth connection check interval in seconds.

BT_MAX_RECONNECT_FAILS.description: Max consecutive reconnect failures before giving up. 0 = unlimited.

BT_CHURN_THRESHOLD.description: Number of rapid connect/disconnect cycles triggering churn isolation. 0 = disabled.

BT_CHURN_WINDOW.description: Window in seconds for churn threshold counting.

BRUTE_FORCE_MAX_ATTEMPTS.description: Max failed login attempts before lockout.

BRUTE_FORCE_WINDOW_MINUTES.description: Time window for counting failed login attempts.

BRUTE_FORCE_LOCKOUT_MINUTES.description: Lockout duration after exceeding max attempts.

STARTUP_BANNER_GRACE_SECONDS.description: Grace period before showing startup guidance banners.

RECOVERY_BANNER_GRACE_SECONDS.description: Grace period before showing recovery guidance banners.

AUTH_PASSWORD_HASH.description: PBKDF2-SHA256 password hash. Managed by the application — do not edit manually.

SECRET_KEY.description: Flask session secret key. Auto-generated on first startup — do not edit.

MA_TOKEN_INSTANCE_HOSTNAME.description: Hostname of the MA instance the token was issued for.

MA_TOKEN_LABEL.description: Label for the MA API token.

MA_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: MA OAuth access token. Managed by the application.

MA_REFRESH_TOKEN.description: MA OAuth refresh token. Managed by the application.

MA_WEBSOCKET_MONITOR.description: Enable persistent WebSocket connection to MA for real-time updates.

VOLUME_VIA_MA.description: Route volume commands through Music Assistant API.

MUTE_VIA_MA.description: Route mute commands through Music Assistant API.

SMOOTH_RESTART.description: Enable smooth daemon restart (reconnect IPC instead of full restart).

DISABLE_PA_RESCUE_STREAMS.description: Disable PulseAudio module-rescue-streams correction on BT reconnect.

DUPLICATE_DEVICE_CHECK.description: Check MA API for duplicate device registrations across bridges.

TRUSTED_PROXIES.description: Additional trusted proxy IP addresses for X-Forwarded-For.

player_name.description: Display name for the speaker. Falls back to MAC if empty.

adapter.description: Bluetooth adapter to use (e.g. 'hci0'). Empty = default adapter.

listen_port.description: Override Sendspin listener port for this device.

delay_ms.description: Per-device static audio delay in milliseconds (negative = earlier).

idle_disconnect_minutes.description: Minutes of idle before BT standby disconnect. 0 = disabled.

keepalive_enabled.description: Send periodic silence to prevent BT speaker auto-sleep.

room_id.description: Home Assistant area/room ID for this device.
